calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288

Petitioners Father of Minors Trung Hao Hac and Mother Ngan Thi Pham present in court. Cantonese Interpreter Ruan Sihong present in court.
Petitioners Sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of minors from Anh Duc Lan Ha to Tiffany Lau Hac and Anh Duc Van Hac to Crystal Van Hac.

Decrees Changing Name signed by the Court.
